landing.title: SuperArchive Permanent Storage Platform
landing.subtitle: Secure, efficient, and permanent. Your data is stored on the Arweave blockchain, preserved forever.
landing.project_goal_desc: SuperArchive is a SaaS platform designed for individuals and enterprises, providing a convenient Web interface and highly efficient API to store files, contracts, digital credentials, and datasets permanently on the Arweave blockchain. Powered by our smart single-wallet mechanism and flexible S-Points payment system, users can easily access secure, decentralized permanent storage without holding cryptocurrencies or managing complex gas fees.
landing.free_tier_desc: Every registered user receives 10 free uploads daily for files smaller than 64KB. Free tier uploads are securely queued and processed via ArDrive Turbo with a 3-second delay, 100% free of charge.
landing.description: Upload to Arweave blockchain, permanently saved without loss.
landing.free_quota_detail: Single files smaller than 64KB, with less than 10 uploads daily, are automatically queued and safely uploaded via ArDrive Turbo with a 3-second delay, 100% free.

auth.title: Sign In or Sign Up
auth.subtitle: Log in instantly with Google, or enter your email address to receive a temporary password.
